method: Each unique 1600x900 render was opened individually at original size. Source, roundtrip 1, and roundtrip 2 are covered because each state has byte-identical slide renders.

slides.observations: Title, subtitle, regular/bold/italic/bold-italic runs, native group text, integer-size callout, symmetric-inset callout, layout label, and master footer are fully visible with no overlap, clipping, or unintended wrap.
The native table, three column headings, all body cells, mixed emphasis, and release-blocking note are fully visible with consistent typography and no overlap, clipping, or unintended wrap.
